blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light freezing rain, highs of 53°F.
Wednesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
